description: Analytics & Performance Features - Performance metrics display, equity curve chart, and P&L history chart

userStories.title: Update PerformanceMetrics with real data
userStories.description: As a trader, I need to see my trading performance metrics.
acceptanceCriteria: Update PerformanceMetrics to fetch from GET /performance/metrics
Add date range selector (today, week, month, all)
Verify in browser that metrics display correctly

userStories.title: Update EquityCurve chart with real data
userStories.description: As a trader, I need to see my equity growth over time.
acceptanceCriteria: Update EquityCurve to fetch from GET /portfolio/equity-history
Display line chart with date on X-axis
Show tooltips with date, equity, P&L on hover
Verify in browser that chart displays correctly

userStories.title: Update P&L history chart with real data
userStories.description: As a trader, I need to see my profit and loss over time.
acceptanceCriteria: Update PnLHistory to fetch from GET /portfolio/pnl-history
Display bar chart with date on X-axis
Show tooltips with date, P&L, trades count on hover
Verify in browser that chart displays correctly
